name: quality.arc42.org-site
description: Quality requirements and goals for software and system architectures
author: arc42

scripts.test:ui: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e UI_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:4000 -v "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel):/work" -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.51.1-jammy sh -lc "npm ci && npx playwright test"
scripts.test:ui:headed: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e UI_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:4000 -v "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel):/work" -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.51.1-jammy sh -lc "npm ci && xvfb-run -a npx playwright test --headed"
scripts.test:ui:debug: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e UI_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:4000 -v "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel):/work" -w /work mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.51.1-jammy -e PWDEBUG=1 sh -lc "npm ci && npx playwright test --debug"
